name: purr-github-mcp

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/oauth-wrapper.js && node --check src/debug-preload.js && node --check src/deployment-mode.js && node --check src/deployment-preload.js && node scripts/oauth-redirect-test.mjs && node scripts/deployment-mode-test.mjs && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs
